title: senecio limumae
intro: Senecio limumae is a plant species, also known as Ragwort or St. John's Fire, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant contains toxic compounds called pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. Senecio limumae has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits in the treatment of conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although its toxic compounds require caution and proper handling.
